creator: info@juanmolina.eu
text:
The patch failed at one point:

--------------------------
|diff --git a/x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo b/x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo
|index 34d5664..8820f11 100644
|--- a/x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo
|+++ b/x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo
--------------------------
Patching file x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo using Plan A...
No such line 3 in input file, ignoring
Hunk #1 failed at 1.
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo.rej


This leads to an error when building:

=> NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-173.14.39.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-173/../nvidia-driver/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-173/../nvidia-driver/distinfo is out of date, or
=> NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-173.14.39.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

But it proceeds if we force to not checksum:
# root /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-173 # make -DNO_CHECKSUM deinstall reinstall clean

Xorg starts and works nicely with the new version of the driver (173.14.39).

Thanks!
